APPLICANTS - Senior Economic Development Specialist - (vice Mendoza) ODGB-SREDS-32-1998
No.
Applicant Name
Email Address
Course
Charged or Found Guilty with Administrative or Criminal Offense

Assessment of SB
DEPDev Pre-Employment Exam Passer (Technical)

r.t: Bachelor's degree relevant to the job

Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Economics, Social Science, Political Science, Public Policy, and Policy Studies, Public Administration, Development Administration, Rural Development, and Development Management, Environmental Planning, and City and Regional Planning, Statistics, Actuarial Science, and Mathematics, Humanities and Communication, Law and Legal Management, Data Science and Information Technology or their equivalent, and other related courses to the abovementioned.

Two (2) years of relevant experience in Economics, Development and Physical Planning, Education Instruction and Management, Local Government Development Planning/Policymaking, Statistical Analysis, Disaster Risk Reduction and Management, Research, and Policy

At least eight (8) hours of relevant training in Policy Review, Analysis and Formulation, Time-series Analysis and Forecasting, Sectoral or Physical Planning, Disaster Risk Reduction and Management, Data Science, and other related topics

si.t: Career Service (Professional) Second Level Eligibility
